gigapan.name: PsychoPhilia
gigapan.description:
PsychoPhilia is a project of the Victoria Canada Burners. It is one of the CORE projects - Circle of Regional Effigies. These are art pieces created by 34 Regional Burner groups.

There is a cluster of CORE projects scattered around the Man, they are beautiful!

For more on PscyhoPhilia see this facebook page:
http://www.facebook.com/VictoriaCOREProject

    Or their group:
